template.name: ANSI A92.2 Major Structural Load Test

questions.prompt: Are there any visible structural deformations?
Are there any broken or cracked structural members?
Are there any cracked welds on structural components?
Are all critical fasteners properly secured and torqued?
Is the equipment in suitable condition to proceed with load testing?

sections.title: Level Surface Stability Test (1.5x Rated Capacity)

questions.prompt: Is the test being conducted on a firm, level surface?
Rated platform capacity documented (lbs).
Test load applied (1.5x rated capacity) documented (lbs).
Platform elevated to maximum working height with test load - Does unit remain stable?
Platform extended to maximum horizontal reach with test load - Does unit remain stable?
Is there any evidence of structural instability during level surface test?
Are there any new structural deformations after level surface test?

sections.title: Slope Stability Test (1.33x Rated Capacity at 5° Slope)

questions.prompt: Is the test being conducted on a firm, 5-degree slope surface?
Slope angle verified and documented (degrees).
Test load applied (1.33x rated capacity) documented (lbs).
Platform elevated to maximum working height with test load on slope - Does unit remain stable?
Platform extended to maximum horizontal reach with test load on slope - Does unit remain stable?
Unit rotated/positioned in most critical orientation on slope - Does unit remain stable?
Is there any evidence of structural instability during slope test?
Are there any new structural deformations after slope test?
After load removal, are there any permanent deformations?
Are there any new cracks in structural members or welds?
Are there any broken or damaged components?
Do all hydraulic/pneumatic systems operate normally after test?
Do all electrical/control systems operate normally after test?
Does the equipment meet all structural load test requirements?
Date of last major structural load test documented.
Equipment service age at time of this test (years) documented.
Next major structural load test due date calculated and documented.
Test performed by (name and certification) documented.
Were photos taken of all critical load points during testing?

fields.label: Date of Last Major Structural Load Test
